parameters.command: SELECT COUNT(*) AS survey_count FROM pending_trial_surveys WHERE platform_user_id = '{{$json.chatId}}' AND platform = 'telegram' AND credited = FALSE;

parameters.jsCode:
// Generate disclaimer + survey link message
const firstName = $('Parse Message').first().json.firstName;
const surveyLink = process.env.THEOREM_REACH_SURVEY_URL || 'https://theoremreach.com/survey/XXXXX';

const message = `🎁 FREE TRIAL — DISCLAIMER

Before we send your free IP, please read:

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
⚠️ FREE TRIAL TERMS ⚠️
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

This free trial uses a Bunche-hosted proxy
shared with other trial users. By accepting, you agree:

❌ NOT for production/critical use
❌ Not guaranteed private (shared with other trials)
❌ IP shared = if one user misbehaves, IP could get flagged
❌ No replacement if proxy dies or expires
❌ Used entirely at YOUR OWN RISK

✅ Bunche-hosted proxy — generally reliable
✅ Auto-expires based on how many surveys you complete
✅ For testing our service only
✅ Upgrade to paid plan for reliability + privacy

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

How e go work:
1. Complete surveys to earn proxy time
2. Each survey = 2 hours of proxy access
3. Do up to 12 surveys = up to 24 hours free!
4. When you ready, tell me "done" and I go send your proxy details

Complete ONE survey to start:
${surveyLink}

After completing, come back and tell me "done"
You fit do more surveys to get more time! 👇`;

return { json: { message } };
